name: Caribbean Shrimp-Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can Black beans, rinsed and drained (15 oz)
1/2 cup Sliced purple onion, separated into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first 10 ingredients; toss gently.
2. Cover and chill for 8 hours, stirring occasionally.
3. Bring water to a boil. Add shrimp, and cook for 3 to 5 minutes or until shrimp turn pink. Drain well and rinse with cold water.
4. Peel and devein the shrimp.
5. Arrange the shrimp around the edge of a lettuce-lined serving plate.
6. Spoon the black bean mixture into the center.
7. Garnish with cherry tomato halves, if desired.
